---
title: "Regularisation"
author: "Sananthaa J S"
date: "2026-03-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)     
library(rms) 
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r }
df <- read.csv("D:/Giloma Grading Mutation Prediction/Glioma-grading-clinical-mutation-prediction/DATA/glioma+grading+clinical+and+mutation+features+dataset/TCGA_InfoWithGrade.csv")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Grade_f = factor(Grade, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("LGG", "GBM"))
  )

set.seed(123)
train_idx <- c(
  sample(which(df$Grade == 0), size = round(0.7 * sum(df$Grade == 0))),
  sample(which(df$Grade == 1), size = round(0.7 * sum(df$Grade == 1)))
)
train <- df[train_idx, ]
test  <- df[-train_idx, ]

cat("Train:", nrow(train), "| Test:", nrow(test), "\n")
```

```{r }
predictors <- c("Age_at_diagnosis", "Gender", "Race",
                "IDH1","TP53","ATRX","PTEN","EGFR","CIC","MUC16","PIK3CA",
                "NF1","PIK3R1","FUBP1","RB1","NOTCH1","BCOR","CSMD3",
                "SMARCA4","GRIN2A","IDH2","FAT4","PDGFRA")

X_train <- as.matrix(train[, predictors])
X_test  <- as.matrix(test[,  predictors])
y_train <- train$Grade
y_test  <- test$Grade
```


```{r }
set.seed(123)
cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train,
                      alpha  = 1,
                      family = "binomial",
                      nfolds = 10)

plot(cv_lasso)
title("Lasso: cross-validation curve", line = 2.5)

cat("Best lambda (min):", round(cv_lasso$lambda.min, 4), "\n")
cat("Best lambda (1se):", round(cv_lasso$lambda.1se, 4), "\n")
```

```{r }
lasso_coefs <- coef(cv_lasso, s = "lambda.min")
lasso_df    <- data.frame(
  Predictor   = rownames(lasso_coefs),
  Coefficient = as.numeric(lasso_coefs)
) %>%
  filter(Predictor != "(Intercept)") %>%
  arrange(Coefficient)

cat("REMOVED by lasso\n")
lasso_df %>% filter(Coefficient == 0) %>% pull(Predictor) %>% print()

cat("Features KEPT by lasso")
lasso_df %>% filter(Coefficient != 0) %>% print()
```
#lasso path
```{r }
lasso_path <- glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha = 1, family = "binomial")
plot(lasso_path, xvar = "lambda", label = TRUE)
title("Lasso coefficient path", line = 2.5)
```

```{r }
set.seed(123)
cv_ridge <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train,
                      alpha  = 0,
                      family = "binomial",
                      nfolds = 10)

plot(cv_ridge)
title("Ridge: cross-validation curve", line = 2.5)

cat("Best lambda (min):", round(cv_ridge$lambda.min, 4), "\n")
```

#test predict

```{r }
pred_lasso <- predict(cv_lasso, newx = X_test,
                      s = "lambda.min", type = "response")[, 1]

pred_ridge <- predict(cv_ridge, newx = X_test,
                      s = "lambda.min", type = "response")[, 1]
```

#Eval
```{r }
auc_lasso <- auc(roc(y_test, pred_lasso))
auc_ridge <- auc(roc(y_test, pred_ridge))

cat("Lasso AUC:", round(auc_lasso, 3), "\n")
cat("Ridge AUC:", round(auc_ridge, 3), "\n")

brier_lasso <- mean((pred_lasso - y_test)^2)
brier_ridge <- mean((pred_ridge - y_test)^2)

cat("Lasso Brier:", round(brier_lasso, 4), "\n")
cat("Ridge Brier:", round(brier_ridge, 4), "\n")

pred_lasso_class <- ifelse(pred_lasso >= 0.5, 1, 0)
conf_lasso <- table(Predicted = pred_lasso_class, Actual = y_test)
sens_lasso <- conf_lasso[2,2] / (conf_lasso[2,2] + conf_lasso[1,2])
spec_lasso <- conf_lasso[1,1] / (conf_lasso[1,1] + conf_lasso[2,1])

cat("\nLasso sensitivity:", round(sens_lasso, 3), "\n")
cat("Lasso specificity:", round(spec_lasso, 3), "\n")

pred_ridge_class <- ifelse(pred_ridge >= 0.5, 1, 0)
conf_ridge <- table(Predicted = pred_ridge_class, Actual = y_test)
sens_ridge <- conf_ridge[2,2] / (conf_ridge[2,2] + conf_ridge[1,2])
spec_ridge <- conf_ridge[1,1] / (conf_ridge[1,1] + conf_ridge[2,1])

cat("Ridge sensitivity:", round(sens_ridge, 3), "\n")
cat("Ridge specificity:", round(spec_ridge, 3), "\n")
```

#ROC
```{r }
roc_lasso <- roc(y_test, pred_lasso)
roc_ridge <- roc(y_test, pred_ridge)

plot(roc_lasso, col = "#3B8BD4", lwd = 2,
     main = "ROC curves — lasso vs ridge")
lines(roc_ridge, col = "#E24B4A", lwd = 2)
abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 2, col = "grey60")
legend("bottomright",
       legend = c(paste0("Lasso (AUC=", round(auc_lasso, 3), ")"),
                  paste0("Ridge (AUC=", round(auc_ridge, 3), ")")),
       col = c("#3B8BD4", "#E24B4A"), lwd = 2)
```

```{r }
# lasso calibration
val.prob(pred_lasso, y_test)
title("Calibration lasso", line = 0.5)

# ridge calibration
val.prob(pred_ridge, y_test)
title("Calibration ridge", line = 0.5)
```
#Compare
```{r }
auc_lr    <- 0.929
brier_lr  <- 0.0948
slope_lr  <- 0.962

slope_lasso <-1.056
slope_ridge <- 1.387   

comparison <- tibble(
  Model           = c("Logistic regression", "Lasso", "Ridge"),
  AUC             = c(auc_lr,    round(auc_lasso, 3), round(auc_ridge, 3)),
  Brier_score     = c(brier_lr,  round(brier_lasso, 4), round(brier_ridge, 4)),
  Cal_slope       = c(slope_lr,  slope_lasso, slope_ridge),
  Sensitivity     = c(0.915,     round(sens_lasso, 3), round(sens_ridge, 3)),
  Specificity     = c(0.877,     round(spec_lasso, 3), round(spec_ridge, 3))
)

print(comparison)
```
NOTES

Random forest — tree-based, no linearity assumption
Compare against all three linear models built so far
Expect RF to have higher AUC but potentially worse calibration
